steps: "Contact Danske Bank Custody to request correction of withholding rate from 25% to 15% per DK-NO tax treaty for NOVO B dividend",
"Submit formal tax reclaim to Danish tax authorities (Skat) for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on 160,000 NOVO B shares",
"Provide Danske Bank with Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty rate confirmation to prevent future overwithholding",
"Monitor account 2801234567 for credit of recoverable amount within 30-60 days of reclaim submission"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
